info.title: Atlas API
info.description: Text-to-SQL data analyst agent. Ask natural-language questions about your data and receive structured answers.

bearerAuth.description: API key or JWT token. Pass via Authorization: Bearer <token>.

post.description: Sends a conversation to the Atlas agent and streams the response as Server-Sent Events using the Vercel AI SDK UI message stream protocol. Each SSE event is a JSON object with a 'type' field: 'text-delta' for incremental text, 'tool-call' for tool invocations, 'tool-result' for tool outputs, 'step-start' for new agent steps, and 'finish' for completion. The response includes an `x-conversation-id` header when conversation persistence is enabled.

200.description: SSE stream using the Vercel AI SDK UI message stream protocol. Each event is a JSON object with a 'type' field (text-delta, tool-call, tool-result, step-start, finish).

400.description: Bad request (malformed JSON, missing datasource, or invalid configuration)

503.description: Provider unreachable, auth error, or rate limited

get.description: Returns the health status of the Atlas API including checks for datasource connectivity, LLM provider, semantic layer, internal database, explore backend, auth mode, and Slack integration. Returns HTTP 200 for 'ok' or 'degraded' status, and 503 for 'error' status.

200.description: Service is healthy or degraded (some optional components unavailable)

post.description: Runs the Atlas agent to completion and returns a structured JSON response with the answer, SQL queries executed, result data, step count, and token usage.

400.description: Bad request (malformed JSON or missing datasource)

503.description: Provider unreachable, auth error, or rate limited

get.description: Returns a paginated list of conversations for the authenticated user. Requires an internal database (DATABASE_URL).
Returns a single conversation with all its messages. Enforces ownership when auth is enabled.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

delete.description: Deletes a conversation and all its messages. Enforces ownership when auth is enabled.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

patch.description: Sets the starred status of a conversation.

400.description: Invalid conversation ID or request body

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

patch.description: Updates the notebook state of a conversation, including cell order, cell properties, and branch metadata.

400.description: Invalid conversation ID or notebook state body

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

post.summary: Fork a conversation at a specific message
post.description: Creates a new conversation by forking an existing one at the specified message. Messages up to and including the fork point are copied to the new conversation. Branch metadata is saved to both the source and forked conversation's notebook state.

400.description: Invalid conversation ID or request body

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

get.description: Returns whether a conversation is currently shared and its share link details.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

post.description: Creates a shareable link for a conversation. Optionally specify expiry duration and share mode (public or org-only).

400.description: Invalid conversation ID or share options

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

delete.description: Revokes the share link for a conversation, making it private again.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

get.description: Returns the content of a shared conversation. No authentication required for public shares. Org-scoped shares require authentication. Rate limited per IP.
Returns a summary of all entity definitions from the semantic layer YAML files. Each entity includes table name, description, column count, join count, and type.
Returns the full parsed YAML content for a single semantic entity, including all dimensions, measures, joins, and query patterns.
Returns a simplified view of semantic layer entities with column details, enabling SDK consumers to discover queryable tables.

post.description: Runs the full SQL validation pipeline (empty check, regex guard, AST parse, table whitelist) and returns structured results. Does NOT execute the query.

get.description: Returns prompt collections available to the current user: built-in collections plus any belonging to the user's organization.
Returns a single prompt collection with all its items, ordered by sort_order.
Returns which OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, Microsoft) are configured so the signup page can render the correct buttons. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

post.description: Validates the URL scheme, creates a temporary connection, runs a health check, and returns the result. The connection is not persisted. Requires managed auth mode and an authenticated session.

400.description: Invalid URL scheme or connection test failed

post.description: Finalizes onboarding by testing the connection, encrypting the URL, and persisting it to the internal database scoped to the user's active organization. Resets the semantic layer whitelist cache so new tables become queryable immediately.

201.description: Connection saved and workspace setup complete

400.description: Invalid URL, connection test failed, or no active organization

404.description: Onboarding requires managed auth mode and DATABASE_URL

409.description: Connection ID already in use by another organization

500.description: Failed to encrypt or save connection

get.description: Returns whether the authenticated user has completed the guided tour. Used on app load to decide whether to auto-start the tour.

404.description: Requires managed auth mode and internal database

post.description: Records that the authenticated user has completed (or dismissed) the guided tour. Idempotent — calling multiple times is safe.

404.description: Requires managed auth mode and internal database

post.summary: Reset guided tour so it can be replayed
post.description: Clears the tour completion timestamp for the authenticated user, allowing the guided tour to be triggered again.

404.description: Requires managed auth mode and internal database

post.summary: List tables from a connected datasource
post.description: Discovers tables, views, and materialized views in a connected database for the wizard table selection step. Supports PostgreSQL and MySQL datasources. Requires admin role.

200.description: Table list from the connected datasource

400.description: Invalid request (missing connectionId or unsupported database type)

post.summary: Profile tables and generate entity YAML
post.description: Profiles selected tables from a connected datasource and generates entity YAML definitions with dimensions, measures, joins, query patterns, and heuristic flags. Requires admin role.

200.description: Generated entity YAML definitions with profiling metadata

400.description: Invalid request (missing connectionId, empty tables, or unsupported database type)

post.description: Shows how the agent would interpret the semantic layer when answering a question, given a set of candidate entity YAML definitions. Requires admin role.

200.description: Preview of how the agent would see the semantic layer

post.summary: Save entities to org-scoped semantic layer
post.description: Persists generated entity YAML files to the organization's semantic layer directory on disk. Validates table names for path traversal, syncs to the internal database if available, and resets the semantic whitelist cache. Requires admin role and an active organization.

400.description: Invalid request (missing connectionId, empty entities, invalid table name, or no active organization)

get.description: Returns query suggestions for one or more tables, ordered by score. Requires at least one 'table' query parameter.

schema.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-50, default 10).

parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-50, default 10).
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns the top query suggestions across all tables, ordered by score.

schema.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-50, default 10).

parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-50, default 10).
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Tracks user engagement with a suggestion. Fire-and-forget — always returns 204 on success.
Email-gated demo entry point. Validates the email, signs a short-lived demo JWT, and captures the lead. IP-based rate limiting prevents abuse. Returns a token for subsequent demo API calls.

Mirrors the main chat endpoint with demo-specific limits. Requires a valid demo token from /demo/start. Streams the response as Server-Sent Events using the Vercel AI SDK UI message stream protocol. Demo conversations are persisted when an internal database is available.

200.description: Streaming SSE response using the Vercel AI SDK UI message stream protocol. Each event is a JSON object with a 'type' field (text-delta, tool-call, tool-result, step-start, finish).

400.description: Bad request (malformed JSON, missing datasource, configuration error, or model not found)

503.description: Provider unreachable, auth error, or rate limited

get.description: Returns a paginated list of conversations for the demo user identified by their demo token. Returns an empty list when no internal database is configured.

schema.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-100, default 50)

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-100, default 50)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns a single demo conversation with all its messages. Requires a valid demo token and enforces ownership.
Returns actions filtered by status. Requires ATLAS_ACTIONS_ENABLED=true and an internal database.

schema.description: Maximum number of actions to return (1-100, default 50).

parameters.description: Maximum number of actions to return (1-100, default 50).
parameters.name: limit

404.description: Actions not available (no internal database or feature disabled)

get.description: Returns a single action. Only returns actions requested by the authenticated user.

post.description: Approves a pending action and triggers execution. Returns the updated action with results. For admin-only approval mode, the requester cannot approve their own action (separation of duties).
Denies a pending action. Optionally provide a reason in the request body. For admin-only approval mode, the requester cannot deny their own action.

400.description: Invalid action ID or request body

post.description: Rolls back an executed action using stored rollback information. Requires the same approval permissions as the original action.

get.description: Returns scheduled tasks owned by the authenticated user. Requires ATLAS_SCHEDULER_ENABLED=true and an internal database.

schema.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-100, default 20).

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-100, default 20).
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a recurring query task with a cron schedule and delivery channel.

400.description: Invalid request body or cron expression

post.description: Serverless scheduler tick endpoint for Vercel Cron or external cron services. Checks for due tasks and executes them. Requires CRON_SECRET or ATLAS_SCHEDULER_SECRET.

404.description: Feature not available (no internal database configured)

get.description: Returns cross-task run history with filtering by task, status, and date range.
Returns a scheduled task with its 10 most recent runs.

put.description: Updates a scheduled task. All fields are optional.

400.description: Invalid request body or cron expression

delete.description: Soft-deletes (disables) a scheduled task.

post.description: Triggers an immediate execution of a scheduled task.
Dry-run delivery format with mock data.

get.description: Returns past execution runs for a scheduled task.

schema.description: Maximum number of runs to return (1-100, default 20).

parameters.description: Maximum number of runs to return (1-100, default 20).
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns all sessions for the authenticated user. Requires managed auth mode and an internal database.

404.description: Session management requires managed auth mode

delete.description: Revokes one of the current user's sessions. Cannot revoke another user's session.

404.description: Session not found or not in managed auth mode

get.description: Returns all organizations with member counts, workspace status, and plan tiers. Ordered by creation date descending.
Returns full organization details including members and pending invitations.

200.description: Organization details with members and invitations

404.description: Organization not found or internal database not configured

delete.description: Soft-deletes a workspace with cascading cleanup: drains connection pools, flushes cache, removes associated data, and marks the workspace as deleted.

404.description: Organization not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns aggregate stats for an organization: member count, conversation count, and audit query count.

patch.description: Suspends a workspace, blocking all queries until reactivation. Drains connection pools for the organization.

404.description: Organization not found or internal database not configured

409.description: Conflict — workspace already suspended or deleted

patch.description: Reactivates a suspended workspace, resuming normal operations.

404.description: Organization not found or internal database not configured

409.description: Conflict — workspace already active or deleted

get.description: Returns a health summary for a workspace including member count, conversation count, recent queries, connection status, scheduled tasks, and pool metrics.

404.description: Organization not found or internal database not configured

patch.description: Updates the plan tier for a workspace. Valid tiers: free, trial, team, enterprise.

400.description: Invalid organization ID or invalid plan tier

404.description: Organization not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns a paginated list of learned query patterns. Supports filtering by status, source entity, and confidence range.

schema.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected
parameters.name: status

get.description: Returns a single learned pattern by ID.

404.description: Pattern not found or internal database not configured

patch.description: Updates a learned pattern's description and/or status. Setting a status records the reviewer and review timestamp.

404.description: Pattern not found or internal database not configured

delete.description: Permanently removes a learned pattern by ID and invalidates the pattern cache.

404.description: Pattern not found or internal database not configured

post.description: Updates the status of multiple learned patterns at once. Maximum 100 IDs per request. Only 'approved' and 'rejected' statuses are allowed.

get.description: Returns all prompt collections for the admin's active organization, including built-in collections. Ordered by sort_order then created_at.

post.description: Creates a new prompt collection. The handler validates that name and industry are present. The collection is always created as non-built-in.

patch.description: Updates a prompt collection's name, industry, and/or description. Built-in collections cannot be modified.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role required or built-in collection

404.description: Collection not found or internal database not configured

delete.description: Permanently deletes a prompt collection and cascades to its items. Built-in collections cannot be deleted.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role required or built-in collection

404.description: Collection not found or internal database not configured

post.description: Adds a new prompt item to a collection. The collection must not be built-in. Sort order defaults to MAX + 1 if not provided.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role required or built-in collection

404.description: Collection not found or internal database not configured

patch.description: Updates a prompt item's question, description, and/or category. The parent collection must not be built-in.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role required or built-in collection

404.description: Collection or item not found, or internal database not configured

delete.description: Permanently removes a prompt item. The parent collection must not be built-in.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role required or built-in collection

404.description: Collection or item not found, or internal database not configured

put.description: Reorders all items within a collection. The itemIds array must contain every item ID in the collection exactly once.

itemIds.description: Ordered array of all item IDs in the collection

400.description: Invalid request body or item ID mismatch

403.description: Forbidden — admin role required or built-in collection

404.description: Collection not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns a paginated list of query suggestions for the admin's active organization. Supports filtering by table name and minimum frequency.

delete.description: Permanently removes a query suggestion by ID.

404.description: Suggestion not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns the current billing period usage summary (query count, token count, active users) for the admin's active workspace.
Returns a combined dashboard payload: current period usage, plan limits, up to 31 daily history points (today + past 30 days), and per-user breakdown (top 50).
Returns historical usage summaries aggregated by period (daily or monthly). Supports date range filtering and limit.

400.description: Invalid parameters or no active organization

get.description: Returns per-user usage breakdown (query count, token count, login count) for the active workspace. Supports date range filtering and limit.

400.description: Invalid parameters or no active organization

get.description: Returns all SSO providers configured for the admin's active organization. Each provider is returned as a summary (without full config).

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Creates a new SSO provider for the admin's active organization. Requires type, issuer, domain, and config.

400.description: Invalid request body or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

get.description: Returns a single SSO provider by ID, including the full (redacted) configuration.

400.description: Invalid provider ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: SSO provider not found or internal database not configured

patch.description: Updates an existing SSO provider. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

400.description: Invalid provider ID, request body, or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: SSO provider not found or internal database not configured

delete.description: Permanently removes an SSO provider by ID.

400.description: Invalid provider ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: SSO provider not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns whether SSO enforcement is enabled for the admin's active organization.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

put.description: Enable or disable SSO enforcement for the admin's active organization. When enabled, password login is blocked for all members — they must sign in via the configured identity provider. Requires at least one active SSO provider to enable enforcement.

400.description: Invalid request body, no active organization, or no active SSO provider

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

get.description: Returns SCIM provider connections and sync status for the admin's active organization.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

delete.description: Revokes a SCIM provider connection, invalidating its bearer token.

400.description: Invalid connection ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: Connection not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns all SCIM group → custom role mappings for the admin's active organization.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Maps a SCIM group display name to an Atlas custom role. When users are provisioned via SCIM and belong to the mapped group, they are assigned the corresponding role.

400.description: Invalid request body or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: Role not found or internal database not configured

409.description: Duplicate mapping for this SCIM group

delete.description: Removes a SCIM group → role mapping. Users already assigned via this mapping keep their role.

400.description: Invalid mapping ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: Mapping not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns all IP allowlist entries for the admin's active organization, plus the caller's current IP address.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Adds a CIDR range to the workspace's IP allowlist. Supports both IPv4 and IPv6 notation.

description.description: Human-readable description of the IP range

400.description: Invalid CIDR format or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

delete.description: Removes an IP allowlist entry by ID. Changes take effect immediately.

400.description: Invalid entry ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: Entry not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns all roles (built-in + custom) for the admin's active organization.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Creates a new custom role for the admin's active organization with the specified permissions.

400.description: Invalid request body or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

put.description: Updates an existing custom role's description and/or permissions. Built-in roles cannot be modified.

400.description: Invalid role ID, request body, or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role, enterprise license required, or built-in role

404.description: Role not found or internal database not configured

delete.description: Permanently removes a custom role. Built-in roles cannot be deleted.

400.description: Invalid role ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role, enterprise license required, or built-in role

404.description: Role not found or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns all users assigned to a specific role in the organization.

200.description: List of members with this role

400.description: Invalid role ID or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: Role not found or internal database not configured

put.description: Assigns a role to a user within the admin's active organization. The role must exist in the organization.

400.description: Invalid user ID, request body, or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: User or role not found, or internal database not configured

get.description: Returns the current audit retention policy for the admin's active organization. Returns null policy if no retention is configured (unlimited).

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

put.description: Sets or updates the audit retention policy. Retention period must be at least 7 days or null (unlimited).

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain audit entries. null = unlimited. Minimum 7.

hardDeleteDelayDays.description: Days after soft-delete before permanent deletion. Default 30.

400.description: Invalid retention configuration or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Exports audit log entries in CSV or JSON format with optional date range filtering. SOC2-ready format. Enterprise feature.

200.description: Exported audit data (CSV or JSON download)

400.description: Invalid export parameters or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Manually triggers soft-delete of audit log entries past the retention window. Normally runs automatically on a daily schedule.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.summary: Trigger permanent deletion of purged entries
post.description: Permanently deletes audit log entries that were soft-deleted longer ago than the hard-delete delay. Normally runs automatically on a daily schedule.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

get.description: Returns the workspace's custom LLM provider configuration, or null if using platform defaults.

200.description: Workspace model configuration (null if using platform default)

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

put.description: Configures a custom LLM provider for the workspace. Overrides the platform default. API key is encrypted at rest.

provider.description: LLM provider. Use 'custom' for any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

apiKey.description: Provider API key. Will be stored encrypted. Omit to keep existing key on update.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for Azure OpenAI or custom endpoints. Required for azure-openai and custom providers.

400.description: Invalid configuration or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

delete.description: Removes the workspace's custom model configuration. The workspace reverts to using the platform default.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

404.description: No custom configuration found or internal database not configured

post.description: Tests a model configuration by making a minimal API call to the provider. Does not save the configuration.

400.description: Invalid configuration or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

get.description: Returns all approval rules for the current organization.

403.description: Forbidden — admin role or enterprise license required

post.description: Create a new approval rule for the organization.

ruleType.description: Type of rule: table name match, column name match, or cost threshold.

pattern.description: Pattern to match. Table/column name for table/column rules. Unused for cost rules.

threshold.description: Cost threshold. Required for cost rules, ignored for table/column rules.

enabled.description: Whether the rule is active. Defaults to true.

400.description: Invalid input or no active organization

delete.description: Delete an approval rule. Pending requests referencing this rule are not affected.

get.description: Returns approval requests for the organization. Filterable by status via query parameter.
Returns a single approval request by ID.

post.description: Approve or deny a pending approval request.

action.description: Whether to approve or deny the request.

post.description: Manually expire all pending approval requests past their expiry time.

get.description: Returns the count of pending (non-expired) approval requests for the organization.
Returns aggregate counts for connections, entities, metrics, glossary terms, plugins, and health warnings.
Returns all discovered semantic layer entities from YAML files.
Returns the full parsed YAML for a single semantic entity.
Returns all discovered semantic metrics from YAML files.
Returns all glossary terms from semantic/glossary.yml and per-source glossaries.
Returns the semantic layer catalog (catalog.yml) if it exists.
Serves raw YAML content for a file in a subdirectory (e.g. entities/users.yml).
Serves raw YAML content for a top-level file (catalog.yml, glossary.yml).
Returns aggregate stats: entity count, column count, join count, measure count, coverage gaps.
Compares the live database schema against YAML entity definitions. Optionally specify a connection via ?connection=id.
Lists DB-backed semantic entities for the active organization.

400.description: No active organization or invalid type

get.description: Returns a single DB-backed semantic entity for the active organization.

400.description: No active organization or invalid type

put.summary: Create or update org semantic entity
put.description: Upserts a DB-backed semantic entity for the active organization.

delete.description: Deletes a DB-backed semantic entity for the active organization.

post.summary: Bulk import org entities from disk
post.description: Imports semantic entities from the org's disk directory into the database.

get.description: Returns all registered database connections.

post.description: Creates a new database connection. Tests it before saving.

get.description: Returns connection pool metrics for all connections.
Returns connection pool metrics scoped by organization.

post.description: Drains all connection pools for a specific organization.
Drains and recreates the pool for a specific connection.

get.description: Returns cache hit/miss statistics.

post.description: Flushes all cache entries.
Tests a database connection URL without persisting it.
Runs a health check on an existing connection.

put.description: Updates an existing connection's URL, description, or schema.

delete.description: Removes a connection from the registry and internal database.

get.description: Returns connection detail including masked URL and schema.
Returns paginated audit log entries with optional filters for user, success, date range, connection, table, column, and search.
Exports audit log entries as a CSV file (up to 10,000 rows). Respects current filters.
Returns aggregate audit stats: total queries, error count, error rate, and queries per day for the last 7 days.
Returns distinct tables and columns from the audit log for filter dropdowns.
Returns queries per day over an optional date range.
Returns top 20 queries by average duration.
Returns top 20 queries by execution count.
Returns error count grouped by error message pattern.
Returns per-user query stats: count, average duration, error count, error rate.
Returns all installed plugins with their status.

post.description: Triggers a health check for a specific plugin.
Enables a plugin. Persists to DB if available.
Disables a plugin. Persists to DB if available.

get.description: Returns the configuration schema and current values for a plugin.

put.description: Updates the configuration for a plugin. Validates against the schema if available.

get.description: Checks if the current user must change their password. Requires authentication but not admin role.

post.description: Changes the current user's password and clears the password_change_required flag. Requires managed auth mode.

get.description: Returns paginated active sessions with user info. Supports search by email or IP.
Returns total, active, and unique user session counts.

delete.description: Revokes a single session by ID.

404.description: Session not found or not available

delete.description: Revokes all sessions for a specific user.

404.description: No sessions found or not available

get.description: Returns paginated users with optional search and role filtering.
Returns aggregate user stats: total, banned, and breakdown by role.

patch.description: Changes a user's role. Cannot change own role or demote the last admin.

post.description: Bans a user with optional reason and expiry.
Removes a ban from a user.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user. Cannot delete yourself or the last admin.

post.description: Revokes all sessions for a user (force logout).
Creates an invitation for a new user. Optionally sends an email via Resend.

get.description: Returns invitations with optional status filter (pending, accepted, revoked, expired).

delete.description: Revokes a pending invitation.

404.description: Invitation not found or not available

get.description: Returns total token consumption with prompt/completion breakdown over a date range.
Returns top N users by token consumption over a date range.
Returns time-series token usage data for charting.
Returns all known settings with current values and sources.

put.description: Sets or updates a settings override. Requires internal database.

delete.description: Removes a settings override, reverting to env var or default value.

get.description: Returns all workspaces across the platform with health metrics, usage data, plan info, and status.
Returns detailed workspace information including resource breakdown and user list.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a workspace with cascading cleanup (conversations, semantic entities, learned patterns, suggestions, scheduled tasks).

post.description: Suspends a workspace, preventing all user access until reactivated.
Reactivates a suspended workspace, restoring user access.

patch.description: Updates the plan tier for a workspace (free, trial, team, enterprise).

planTier.description: The new plan tier for the workspace.

get.description: Returns aggregate platform statistics: total workspaces, active users, total queries, MRR.
Identifies workspaces consuming disproportionate resources (>3x median queries, tokens, or storage).
Returns the billing status for the active workspace, including plan details, usage metrics, and subscription info.

404.description: Billing not available or workspace not found

post.description: Creates a Stripe Customer Portal session for the active workspace. Returns a URL to redirect the user to.

400.description: No active organization or no Stripe customer

post.description: Enables or disables Bring Your Own Token (BYOT) mode for the active workspace. Requires admin or owner role.

400.description: Bad request — missing or invalid body, or no active organization

403.description: Forbidden — admin or owner role required

404.description: Billing not available or workspace not found

post.description: Handles Slack slash commands (/atlas). Acks within 3 seconds and processes the query asynchronously. Requires SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET. Request signature is verified via x-slack-signature header.

Handles Slack Events API callbacks including url_verification challenges and thread follow-up messages. Bot messages are ignored to prevent loops. Request signature is verified via x-slack-signature header.
Handles Slack block_actions interactions (approve/deny action prompts). Acks immediately and processes the action asynchronously. Request signature is verified via x-slack-signature header.

get.description: Redirects to the Slack OAuth authorization page. Requires SLACK_CLIENT_ID to be configured.

302.description: Redirect to Slack OAuth authorization page

get.description: Handles the OAuth callback from Slack, exchanges the code for a bot token, and saves the installation. Returns HTML on success or failure.

400.description: Invalid or expired state, or missing code

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password. Only available when auth mode is 'managed' (Better Auth).

404.description: Auth routes not enabled (not in managed mode)

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. Returns a session token. Only available when auth mode is 'managed'.

get.description: Returns the current session and user info. Requires a valid session cookie or Authorization header.

post.description: Destroys the current session.

get.description: Serves a self-contained HTML page for iframe embedding. Renders the AtlasChat component with configurable theme, API URL, position, branding, and initial query.

parameters.name: logo
parameters.description: HTTPS URL to a custom logo image.

parameters.name: initialQuery
parameters.description: Auto-send query on first open (max 500 chars).

get.description: Self-contained ESM bundle (React + AtlasChat). Cached for 24 hours.
Pre-compiled Tailwind CSS for widget components. Cached for 24 hours.

Returns a self-contained IIFE script that injects a floating chat bubble and iframe overlay into any host page. Reads data-* attributes from its own `<script>` tag for configuration. Exposes window.Atlas programmatic API.
Returns ambient TypeScript declarations for window.Atlas. Fallback for embedders who load only the script tag without installing @useatlas/react.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication routes (managed auth via Better Auth)

tags.name: Widget
tags.description: Embeddable chat widget (host page, loader script, assets)
